name: expresscare-dashboard
description: Real-time geographic demand intelligence dashboard for ExpressCare Maryland, fusing live EDAS ED capacity with GeoHealth SDOH data and a LightGBM forecast model.

scripts.prepare-data: npm run cms && npm run geocode:expresscare && npm run geocode:competitors && npm run hexgrid && npm run base-scores && npm run weather && npm run flu && npm run copy-data
scripts.model:extract: cd model && source venv/Scripts/activate && python extract_training_data.py
scripts.model:hscrc: cd model && source venv/Scripts/activate && python parse_hscrc.py
scripts.model:features: cd model && source venv/Scripts/activate && python features.py
scripts.model:train: cd model && source venv/Scripts/activate && python train.py
scripts.model:export: cd model && source venv/Scripts/activate && python export_model.py && python generate_baselines.py
scripts.model:pipeline: npm run model:extract && npm run model:hscrc && npm run model:features && npm run model:train && npm run model:export
